meta.architecture_style: Feature-sliced MVVM with centralized domain layer and Koin DI
meta.executive_summary: BabyWeather.Android is a native Android app providing weather-based clothing recommendations for babies. Built with Kotlin, Jetpack (Navigation, ViewModel, Flow), and Koin DI. Architecture uses feature-sliced modules (page_*) each owning Fragment, ViewModel, Controller, and Koin module. Domain layer centralizes repository interfaces and REST API communication via Retrofit+Moshi. Firebase suite handles analytics, crash reporting, and remote config; RevenueCat manages subscriptions.

file_placement_rules.description: Each feature owns fragment, viewmodel, controller, cells, dialogs, and Koin module
Koin DI module per feature; registered in BabyWeatherApplication
Interface+impl pair in domain layer; never in feature modules
XML layout paired with adapterDelegateViewBinding cell class
All dependency versions centralized in buildSrc; never hardcode in build.gradle.kts
Firebase config is variant-specific; main sourceset has no google-services.json

naming_conventions.description: Class name encodes both domain and architectural role
Prefix: fragment_, cell_, dialog_, view_, layout_
Three build variants; staging uses production Firebase but debug API key
Encapsulate mutable flows; expose read-only counterparts

architectural_style.title: Feature-sliced MVVM with centralized domain
architectural_style.chosen: page_* feature modules each own UI+state+DI; shared domain layer owns repositories
architectural_style.rationale: Enables team parallelization on features while sharing API/business logic

key_decisions.title: Koin over Hilt for DI
key_decisions.chosen: Koin service locator with module-per-feature composition
key_decisions.rationale: Simpler setup, no annotation processing overhead, fits Kotlin-first approach

key_decisions.title: Controller pattern alongside ViewModel
key_decisions.rationale: Separates analytics/navigation side-effects from pure UI state in ViewModel

key_decisions.title: RevenueCat for subscriptions
key_decisions.chosen: RevenueCat SDK abstracts Google Play Billing
key_decisions.rationale: Cross-platform abstraction, receipt validation, entitlement management

key_decisions.title: Sealed state machines for auth/nav
key_decisions.chosen: LoginSheetState, LoginState sealed interfaces drive state transitions
key_decisions.rationale: Type-safe exhaustive state handling prevents illegal state combinations

key_decisions.title: buildSrc Kotlin DSL for dependency management
key_decisions.rationale: Single source of truth for versions; IDE autocomplete; no hardcoded strings

trade_offs.accept: Koin runtime resolution vs compile-time safety
trade_offs.benefit: Faster build times and simpler module composition

trade_offs.accept: XML layouts over full Compose adoption
trade_offs.benefit: Stable, battle-tested UI with MotionLayout/ConstraintLayout animations
Simplified local builds; CI overrides via Azure Pipelines variable groups

out_of_scope: No backend/server code in this repository
No iOS, Flutter, or React Native code

components.structure_type: Feature-sliced modular monorepo (single Android app module)

components.name: Application/Process Layer
components.responsibility: Koin DI init, process lifecycle, analytics/crash setup, dark mode init

key_interfaces.name: BabyWeatherApplication
key_interfaces.description: Composes all Koin modules; observes ProcessLifecycleOwner

components.name: Activity/Navigation Layer
components.responsibility: NavController host, bottom nav, global dialogs, theme observation
exposes_to: Feature modules via NavController and shared event flows

key_interfaces.name: MainController
key_interfaces.description: Exposes navigation SharedFlows and current page StateFlow

key_files.description: Root layout with NavHostFragment and bottom nav

components.name: Feature Layer (page_*)
components.responsibility: User-facing screens: dashboard, locations, settings, tips, baby profiles, subscriptions
exposes_to: Activity/Navigation Layer via nav events and shared flows

key_interfaces.name: DashboardViewModel
key_interfaces.description: Manages weather display state and baby profile selection

components.name: Domain Layer
components.responsibility: Repository interfaces, domain entities, DataSource abstraction, API DTOs

key_interfaces.name: LocationRepository
key_interfaces.description: Weather data access; exposes time-of-day flow for theme switching

components.name: Build Configuration
components.responsibility: Centralized version management, dependency declarations, build plugins

key_files.description: App module build config with all buildTypes and signingConfigs

patterns.name: StateFlow/SharedFlow ViewModel→Fragment
patterns.when_to_use: All UI state updates and one-time navigation/dialog events
patterns.how_it_works: ViewModel exposes StateFlow<UiState>; Fragment collects inside repeatOnLifecycle(STARTED)

patterns.name: Koin Dependency Injection
patterns.when_to_use: Providing repositories, controllers, ViewModels to all layers
patterns.how_it_works: Module-per-feature DSL; root context started in BabyWeatherApplication with all modules

patterns.name: Navigation Component SafeArgs
patterns.how_it_works: NavigationRequest sealed events emitted by Controllers; MainActivity executes via NavController

patterns.name: RecyclerView Adapter Delegates
patterns.when_to_use: Heterogeneous list screens (dashboard, settings, tips, locations)
patterns.how_it_works: adapterDelegateViewBinding DSL creates typed delegates composed into one adapter

patterns.name: REST API via Retrofit+Moshi
patterns.when_to_use: All server data fetching (weather, settings, children, tips)
patterns.how_it_works: APIService interface; OkHttp with auth interceptor; Moshi codegen DTOs; NetworkResponse sealed wrapper

integrations.purpose: Crash reporting, event tracking, A/B testing, feature flags
integrations.integration_point: google-services.json per build variant; initialized in BabyWeatherApplication

integrations.purpose: In-app subscription management and Google Play Billing abstraction

integrations.integration_point: MIXPANEL_KEY buildConfigField per buildType; RaptorAnalyticsKit wrapper

integrations.purpose: Base presentation classes, login SDK, feature flags, analytics kit
integrations.integration_point: GitHub Packages Maven repo; getGprUser()/getGprKey() in gradle.properties

pattern_selection_guide.rationale: Avoids re-delivery on configuration change unlike StateFlow
Single source of truth; no direct feature-to-feature dependencies

where_to_put_code.new_screen: Create page_<feature>/ with Fragment, ViewModel, Modules<Feature>.kt; register module in BabyWeatherApplication
where_to_put_code.new_api_endpoint: Add to APIService interface in common/domain/api/; add DTO with @JsonClass(generateAdapter=true)
where_to_put_code.new_dependency_version: Add version constant to buildSrc/src/main/kotlin/Dependencies.kt; reference in app/build.gradle.kts
where_to_put_code.new_list_item: Add cell_<name>.xml to res/layout/; create Cell.kt with adapterDelegateViewBinding in feature cells/ dir
where_to_put_code.new_analytics_event: Create event class extending BasicEvent in util/services/analytics/events/; emit via raptorAnalytics.logEvent()

pattern_selection.state_management: StateFlow for UI state, SharedFlow for events
pattern_selection.dependency_injection: Koin module DSL; single{} for services, viewModel{} for ViewModels
pattern_selection.navigation: NavController via NavigationRequest sealed events from Controllers

error_mapping.description: Token expired; trigger login flow via LoginController
Server validation error; display via error SharedFlow

stack.name: Kotlin Coroutines + Flow
stack.purpose: Async operations and reactive state streams

stack.name: AndroidX Navigation + SafeArgs
stack.purpose: Fragment navigation graph with typed args

stack.name: ConstraintLayout / MotionLayout
stack.purpose: Primary XML layout engine; scene animations

stack.name: BitRaptors SDK Android
stack.purpose: Base presentation, login, feature flags, analytics kit

templates.description: ViewModel with StateFlow and SharedFlow for a page_* feature
Koin module registering ViewModel and dependencies for a feature

frontend.framework: Android Native Kotlin (Jetpack Fragment + XML layouts)
frontend.rendering_strategy: Imperative XML layouts with ConstraintLayout/MotionLayout; ViewBinding for type-safe view access

ui_components.name: MainActivity
ui_components.description: Root NavHostFragment container with bottom navigation

ui_components.name: DashboardFragment
ui_components.description: Home screen: weather, hourly forecast, clothing recommendations

ui_components.name: SettingsFragment
ui_components.description: User profile, subscription status, baby profiles, app preferences

ui_components.name: LocationsFragment
ui_components.description: Manage saved locations; search and delete with shared element transitions

ui_components.name: LoginBottomSheet
ui_components.description: Google OAuth + magic link authentication bottom sheet

ui_components.name: BabySettingsFragment
ui_components.description: Baby profile create/edit: name, birthdate, avatar emoji, color palette

state_management.approach: MVVM with StateFlow/SharedFlow; Controllers for cross-cutting orchestration
state_management.server_state: Fetched in repositories via Retrofit; cached in-memory in ViewModel StateFlow
state_management.local_state: SharedPreferences for auth tokens, dark mode, terms acceptance
state_management.rationale: StateFlow for continuous UI state; SharedFlow for discrete events; avoids LiveData inconsistencies

routing.description: Splash; determines initial destination via AppStartService
Single setting editor (temp unit, theme, language, icon)

data_fetching.name: Repository pattern
data_fetching.mechanism: suspend fun in Repository; called from viewModelScope.launch{}
data_fetching.when_to_use: All server data: weather, settings, children, tips

data_fetching.name: Flow-based streaming
data_fetching.mechanism: Repository exposes Flow<T>; ViewModel combines via combine()/flatMapLatest()
data_fetching.when_to_use: Location time-of-day theme, real-time location service state

frontend.styling: Material Design 3 with XML themes; day/night variants in values/themes.xml + values-night/themes.xml; API-level overrides in values-v31/v32/v33; adaptive color resources in res/color/
key_conventions: ViewBinding enabled; always use binding.* not findViewById()
Fragments use BaseBindingFragment from BitRaptors SDK
All new code in Kotlin; Java deprecated
Feature modules must not import other feature modules directly

steps: 1. Create page_<feature>/ dir with Fragment.kt, ViewModel.kt, Modules<Feature>.kt
3. Register destination in navigation_main.xml with SafeArgs arguments if needed
4. Add Modules<Feature> to startKoin{} modules list in BabyWeatherApplication

developer_recipes.task: Add a new REST API endpoint
steps: 1. Add @JsonClass(generateAdapter=true) DTO data class in common/domain/api/dto/
2. Add suspend fun to APIService interface with @GET/@POST/@PUT/@DELETE annotation
3. Add mapping function in Repository implementation; expose via repository interface
4. Inject repository into feature ViewModel via Koin; call in viewModelScope.launch{}
1. Add version constant to appropriate object in buildSrc/src/main/kotlin/Dependencies.kt
2. Add dependency string constant referencing the version constant
3. Reference via object accessor in app/build.gradle.kts dependencies block (e.g. Libraries.newLib)
3. Commit; Azure Pipelines will pick up new values on next triggered build

architecture_diagram:
graph TD App[BabyWeatherApplication
Koin Init + Lifecycle] --> Main[MainActivity
NavController + BottomNav] Main --> Dash[DashboardFragment
Weather + Clothing] Main --> Locs[LocationsFragment
Saved Locations] Main --> Sets[SettingsFragment
Prefs + Babies] Main --> Tips[TipsFragment] Main --> Login[LoginBottomSheet
OAuth + MagicLink] Dash --> Domain[Domain Layer
LocationRepository] Sets --> Domain Locs --> Domain Domain --> API[REST API
Retrofit + Moshi] Domain --> SP[SharedPreferences
Local Cache] App --> Firebase[Firebase Suite
Analytics/Crash/Config] App --> RevCat[RevenueCat
Subscriptions] App --> BitSDK[BitRaptors SDK
Presentation + Login]

pitfalls.description: Feature Koin modules not added to BabyWeatherApplication startKoin{} block cause runtime NoBeanDefFoundException—no compile-time safety.
pitfalls.recommendation: Always add new Modules<Feature>.kt to the modules list in BabyWeatherApplication immediately when creating a feature

pitfalls.description: DTOs missing @JsonClass(generateAdapter=true) compile without error but fail at runtime with JsonDataException.
pitfalls.recommendation: Annotate every DTO used with Moshi; enable kapt strict mode to catch missing adapters at build time

pitfalls.description: app/build.gradle.kts contains plaintext keystore passwords (WeatherBaby, BabyWeather) and OAuth tokens in buildConfigField.
pitfalls.recommendation: Rotate passwords to Azure Pipelines variable group 'babyweather-android-build-variables'; never commit real credentials

pitfalls.description: Collecting StateFlow/SharedFlow outside repeatOnLifecycle(STARTED) causes events to be processed when Fragment is stopped.
pitfalls.recommendation: Always wrap flow collection in lifecycleScope.launch { repeatOnLifecycle(Lifecycle.State.STARTED) { ... } }

pitfalls.description: Staging uses production Firebase project (babyweather-ad243), not a separate staging Firebase project—analytics and crash data mingles.
pitfalls.recommendation: Treat staging Firebase data as potentially polluted; filter by app_version or variant in Firebase console

implementation_guidelines.pattern_description: Each feature declares a module DSL file (Modules<Feature>.kt); all modules composed in BabyWeatherApplication.startKoin{}. Singletons for services, viewModel{} for screen-scoped state, factory{} for parameterized instances (BabySettingsViewModel with babyId).
implementation_guidelines.usage_example: single { MainController(get(), get()) } — get() resolves RaptorAnalytics and InAppReviewManager from container
tips: Use factory { (babyId: String) -> BabySettingsViewModel(babyId, get()) } for parameterized ViewModels
Avoid circular dependencies between feature modules—route through domain layer instead
Test modules with koin-test checkModules() to catch missing bindings before runtime

implementation_guidelines.capability: REST API with Retrofit + Moshi + NetworkResponse
implementation_guidelines.pattern_description: APIService interface with suspend functions; Moshi converter with @JsonClass codegen DTOs; NetworkResponseAdapterFactory wraps all responses in sealed NetworkResponse<T, String>; HttpRequestInterceptor injects Bearer token; logging interceptor active in debug only.
implementation_guidelines.usage_example: @GET("pages/home") suspend fun getHomePage(@Query("locationKey") key: String): NetworkResponse<HomePageDto, String>
tips: Handle all four NetworkErrorResponse variants (ApiError, NetworkError, AuthenticationError, UnknownError) exhaustively in repositories
Base URL differs per buildType: debug→babyweather-dev.herokuapp.com, release/staging→babyweather.herokuapp.com
Disable logging interceptor in release builds to prevent PII in crash logs

implementation_guidelines.pattern_description: Default values declared in res/xml/remote_config_defaults.xml; fetched at startup via BitRaptors Feature Flag SDK. Feature modules conditionally render UI based on flag values without redeployment.
tips: Staging and release both use the same Firebase project (babyweather-ad243)—use Remote Config conditions to target staging package
featureFlagDataSourceOverrideModule allows local override of flags in debug builds for testing

implementation_guidelines.pattern_description: LoginController wraps RaptorLoginManager; transforms external UserState to app's LoginState (AnonymousUser/LoggedInUser). LoginSheetState sealed interface (Init→Visible→Expanded→Hidden) drives bottom sheet visibility. SharedPreferences persist terms acceptance.
implementation_guidelines.usage_example: loginController.handleGoogleLogin(activityResultLauncher) — triggers Google Sign-In and emits LoginState.LoggedInUser on success
tips: OAuth client IDs differ by buildType; debug uses project 151823554728, release/staging uses 898696094253
appStartService.refreshAfterLogin() must be called after successful token receipt to reload all app data
Use EncryptedSharedPreferences in production for token storage

implementation_guidelines.pattern_description: Three buildTypes (debug, staging, release) each with distinct buildConfigField values for API URLs, OAuth tokens, Mixpanel keys, and RevenueCat keys. Version constants centralized in buildSrc/src/main/kotlin/. Source sets allow variant-specific Kotlin code and resources.
implementation_guidelines.usage_example: BuildConfig.BASE_API_URL resolves to env-specific URL at compile time; no runtime URL switching needed
tips: Never reference BuildConfig fields at module init time before Application.onCreate(); use lazy or inject
Staging APK suffix is '-staging'; use versionName to identify variant in crash reports
buildSrc changes invalidate the entire Gradle cache; minimize changes during active development

development_rules.rule: Always declare dependency versions in buildSrc/src/main/kotlin/Dependencies.kt objects; never hardcode version strings in app/build.gradle.kts
development_rules.source: buildSrc/src/main/kotlin/Dependencies.kt — AndroidSdk.compileApi, Network.retrofit, Firebase.* objects consumed by app/build.gradle.kts

development_rules.rule: Always place google-services.json in variant-specific source sets (src/debug/, src/staging/, src/release/); never in src/main/
development_rules.source: app/src/staging/google-services.json, app/src/release/google-services.json — separate Firebase configs per variant

development_rules.rule: Always organize new features as page_<feature>/ directories containing Fragment, ViewModel, Modules<Feature>.kt, cells/, dialog/, controller/ subdirectories
development_rules.source: Feature-slice pattern observed across page_dashboard, page_locations, page_settings, page_tips, page_baby_settings

development_rules.rule: Always run cleanTestDebugUnitTest testDebugUnitTest Gradle tasks before assembling APK in CI; never skip unit tests
Always authenticate to GitHub Packages Maven repo using getGprUser()/getGprKey() functions from gradle.properties for BitRaptors SDK; never hardcode credentials
Always use Kotlin source sets (src/main/kotlin, src/debug/kotlin, src/release/kotlin); never add Java files to this project
development_rules.source: app/build.gradle.kts sourceSets block explicitly sets java.srcDirs to kotlin directories only

development_rules.rule: Never commit real keystore passwords to source; use Azure Pipelines variable group 'babyweather-android-build-variables' to override signingConfig values in CI
development_rules.source: app/build.gradle.kts signingConfigs currently contains plaintext passwords (WeatherBaby, BabyWeather) — security risk requiring CI variable override

deployment.runtime_environment: Android devices (minSdk 23 / targetSdk 34); backend REST API on Heroku
deployment.serverless_functions: Firebase Cloud Functions (implied by firebase_url in google-services.json)
ci_cd: Azure Pipelines — triggered on PR to develop branch
Artifacts uploaded to AppCenter via release stage
distribution: Direct APK install (debug buildType — local dev)
supporting_services: Firebase Analytics + Crashlytics + Performance + Remote Config (project: babyweather-ad243)
deployment.environment_config: buildConfigField values per buildType in app/build.gradle.kts; Firebase config via variant-specific google-services.json
key_files: file: app/build.gradle.kts; description: All buildTypes, signingConfigs, buildConfigFields
file: buildSrc/src/main/kotlin/Release.kt; description: versionCode and versionName source of truth
file: app/src/staging/google-services.json; description: Firebase config for staging builds
file: app/src/release/google-services.json; description: Firebase config for release builds
